description_long: This adult pedestrian is dressed in casual summer attire, featuring a short-sleeved button-up shirt with a floral pattern and knee-length shorts. The individual wears a wide-brimmed sun hat and sunglasses, suggesting protection from the sun, and has a camera hanging from a strap around the neck, indicating a tourist or sightseeing context. On the left wrist, a watch is visible, and the person is wearing flip-flop sandals. The figure's build is slender, with defined arms and legs, and the posture is relaxed and upright. The overall appearance is that of a vacationer or tourist, ready for a day of exploring urban or park environments. The clothing and accessories are detailed, with visible seams, buttons, and realistic folds.
description: A casually dressed adult wearing a sun hat, floral shirt, shorts, sunglasses, and flip-flops, with a camera around the neck and a watch on the wrist. The figure has a relaxed, upright posture and a tourist-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sun hat, sunglasses, floral shirt, camera, shorts, watch, and flip-flops clearly, with both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the sun hat, the camera hanging from the neck, and the watch on the left wrist.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sun hat, shirt, and shorts, as well as the figure's hair and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face under the hat, the camera strap, and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved button-up shirt, knee-length shorts, wide-brimmed sun hat, sunglasses, wristwatch
